title: The Digital Watermarking Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the end-to-end process of embedding and detecting a digital watermark to protect data ownership and prove authenticity.
elements: Original Digital Content (e.g., image, document, video)
Watermark Embedding Algorithm (with a secret key)
Watermark Detection Algorithm (with the same secret key)
relationships: Algorithm combines Original Content and Watermark to produce Watermarked Content
Watermarked Content is distributed and may undergo Attack
Detection Algorithm analyzes potentially modified content
Detection Result confirms the presence and integrity of the watermark
